mnemonics: PROFIT: P - Parameters, R - Regularization, O - Objectives, F - Functions, I - Iterations, T - Techniques
keyPoints: Focuses on iterative improvement of continuous variables
Often uses gradient-based methods for finding local/global optima
Requires careful handling of constraints and convergence criteria
commonMistakes: Confusing local minima with global optimum
Improper selection of step size in gradient descent
Neglecting to verify constraint satisfaction in solutions
